questions.question_text: What does this sign warn of?

answers.1: A steep downhill gradient.
answers.2: A road slope on the right-hand side.
answers.3: A steep uphill gradient.

questions.question_text: What applies when driving in the crawler lane?

answers.1: The rightmost lane must be used if I am driving more slowly than the speed shown on the sign.
answers.2: Stopping or parking in the crawler lane is permitted if necessary.
answers.3: Leaving the crawler lane is regarded as changing traffic lanes.
answers.4: The merge rule applies when leaving the crawler lane.

answers.1: There may be oncoming traffic.
answers.2: I am driving on a one-way road with no oncoming traffic.
answers.3: Traffic flows in one direction only.

questions.question_text: What applies when I pass this sign?

answers.1: I am entering a motorway.
answers.2: I am entering a carriageway.
answers.3: The maximum speed for passenger cars and motorcycles is 130 km/h.
answers.4: The maximum speed for passenger cars and motorcycles is 110 km/h.

questions.question_text: What does the main sign with the supplementary sign mean?

answers.1: Stopping on the carriageway is prohibited unless stopping is necessary because of traffic conditions.
answers.2: Parking on the verge is permitted.
answers.3: Parking on the verge is prohibited, but stopping is permitted.
answers.4: Parking is permitted both on the carriageway and on the verge.

questions.question_text: What does this railway crossing sign mean?

answers.1: A multi-track railway crossing.
answers.2: A single-track railway crossing.
answers.3: Stopping is prohibited.

answers.1: Two traffic lanes merge, and drivers must cooperate.
answers.2: Crossing traffic ahead.
answers.3: The traffic lanes become wider further ahead.

questions.question_text: What does this sign warn of?

answers.1: A slow lane ahead.
answers.2: A mandatory direction past an obstacle.
answers.3: The road narrows on the right-hand side.

questions.question_text: What does the main sign with the supplementary sign mean?

answers.1: Stopping and parking are prohibited on the road section after the sign.
answers.2: Stopping is prohibited on the road section before the sign.
answers.3: It is permitted to stop briefly to pick up or set down a passenger on the road section before the sign.

answers.1: Passenger cars are prohibited.
answers.2: I am leaving a motorway.
answers.3: I am leaving a carriageway.
answers.4: After passing the sign, I continue on an ordinary road where the normal traffic rules apply.

answers.1: No through traffic.
answers.2: End of restriction.
answers.3: Traffic in both directions is prohibited.

answers.1: Traffic lane layout with changing traffic lanes.
answers.2: Traffic lane layout with merging.
answers.3: Crawler lane.
answers.4: There is a duty to give way to all traffic further ahead.

answers.1: Entry is prohibited for all vehicles.
answers.2: I may enter by passenger car, but not by bicycle or moped.
answers.3: Passenger cars are prohibited, but bicycles and mopeds are permitted.

answers.1: I may drive only in the direction shown by the arrow.
answers.2: Turning left is prohibited.
answers.3: I may drive in both directions.

answers.1: It is prohibited to drive faster than 40 km/h.
answers.2: I should not exceed the recommended speed.
answers.3: I must always drive at the indicated speed.
answers.4: I should expect speed bumps or other speed-reducing measures on the road.

answers.1: A dangerous intersection where crossing traffic must give way to all traffic.
answers.2: I have a duty to stop at the intersection ahead.
answers.3: I have a duty to give way to all traffic at the intersection ahead.
answers.4: I am driving on a main road.

answers.1: Only motor vehicles are permitted on this road.
answers.2: Overtaking is prohibited here.
answers.3: I may overtake trucks but not passenger cars.
answers.4: I am permitted to overtake a two-wheeled bicycle or a small two-wheeled moped.

questions.question_text: What does this sign warn of?

answers.1: Loose chippings on the roadway that may damage the passenger car.
answers.2: A slippery road when it hails.
answers.3: Risk of rockslides and falling rocks on the roadway.

answers.1: Turning left at the intersection is prohibited.
answers.2: I am permitted to make a U-turn at the intersection.
answers.3: Turning left is prohibited only if there is oncoming traffic.
answers.4: I must continue straight ahead unless another direction is permitted.

answers.1: I may choose my own speed as long as I do not create danger or inconvenience.
answers.2: I am entering an open area and play area. When leaving the area, I have a duty to give way to all traffic.
answers.3: I may park anywhere in the area as long as I do not inconvenience others.
answers.4: I must not drive faster than 15 km/h in the area.

questions.question_text: What must I be particularly mindful of if I see this sign?

answers.1: Roadworks that may create dangerous conditions along the verge.
answers.2: A slippery verge.
answers.3: A dangerous verge that may make it difficult to control the passenger car, such as a soft verge or a high drop.

answers.1: Previous prohibitions on the road section no longer apply, except for stopping and parking prohibitions.
answers.2: All prohibitions on the preceding road section no longer apply.
answers.3: Speed-reducing measures in the area come to an end.

questions.question_text: What does this sign warn of?

answers.1: A railway crossing without barriers.
answers.2: A railway crossing with barriers.
answers.3: A railway station ahead.

questions.question_text: What applies when I pass this sign?

answers.1: I am entering a carriageway.
answers.2: I am entering a motorway.
answers.3: I am entering a parking area for passenger cars.

questions.question_text: What must I be particularly mindful of if I see this sign?

answers.1: Wild animals may cross the roadway, so I should be especially cautious.
answers.2: The sign warns of livestock on the roadway, so I should be especially cautious.
answers.3: The sign warns of dangerous animals that may cross the roadway, so I should be especially cautious.
